title: What we know so far about rescue of US airman in Iran
summary_full: The US has rescued the missing crew member of the US F-15 fighter jet which was shot down over southern Iran.
summary_public: The US has rescued the missing crew member of the US F-15 fighter jet which was shot down over southern Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: US F-15 fighter jet which was shot down over southern Iran
